description_for_human: Developer livestreaming platform. Watch developers build in real-time, collaborate through live chat, and discover AI-native development workflows.
description_for_model: AINative Studio Live is a developer livestreaming platform for coding streams, AI-native development showcases, and build-in-public sessions. Features live IDE streaming via Cloudflare Stream, real-time chat, categories (web dev, mobile, AI/ML, DevOps, game dev), VOD replays, and streamer analytics. Part of the AINative Studio ecosystem.
